sample.name: (+)-car-3-ene
sample.claimText: (+)-car-3-ene: A car-3-ene (3,7,7-trimethylbicyclo[4.1.0]hept-3-ene) that has S configuration at position 1 and R configuration at position 6.

sample.name: (+)-8-hydroxycalamenene
sample.claimText: (+)-8-hydroxycalamenene: A sesquiterpenoid consisting of 5,6,7,8-tetrahydronaphthalen-1-ol having two methyl substituents at the 3- and 8-positions, an isopropyl substituent at the 5-position and (+)-(5R,8S)-configuration.

sample.name: (+)-camphene
sample.claimText: (+)-camphene: A camphene (2,2-dimethyl-3-methylenebicyclo[2.2.1]heptane) that has R configuration at position 1 and S configuration at position 4.

sample.name: (+)-iridodial
sample.claimText: (+)-iridodial: An iridodial that is (1R,2R)-2-[(2R)-1-oxopropan-2-yl]cyclopentanecarbaldehyde substituted by a methyl group at position 2 (2S-stereoisomer).

sample.name: (+)-iridodial lactol
sample.claimText: (+)-iridodial lactol: An iridoid monoterpenoid that is 1,4a,5,6,7,7a-hexahydrocyclopenta[c]pyran substituted by methyl groups at positions 4 and 7 and a hydroxy group at position 1 (the 1R,4aS,7S,7aR-stereoisomer).

sample.name: (+)-menthone
sample.claimText: (+)-menthone: A menthone that is cyclohexanone substituted by a methyl and an isopropyl group at positions 5 and 2 respectively (the 2R,5S-stereoisomer).

sample.name: (+)-N-methylconiine
sample.claimText: (+)-N-methylconiine: A piperidine that is (+)-coniine bering an N-methyl substituent.

sample.name: (+)-norephedrine
sample.claimText: (+)-norephedrine: An amphetamine that is propylbenzene substituted by a hydroxy group at position 1 and by an amino group at position 2 (the 1S,2R-stereoisomer).
